object_properties.definition: links a commit gate to the policy decision it emits so side-effect approval, denial, escalation, or conditional release is traceable.

definitions.en: links a commit gate to the policy decision it emits so side-effect approval, denial, escalation, or conditional release is traceable.
definitions.zh: 该关系把提交门连接到其产生的策略决策，使副作用批准、拒绝、升级或有条件释放可追踪。
definitions.ja: この関係は、コミットゲートをそれが発行するポリシー判断に結び、副作用の承認、拒否、エスカレーション、条件付き解放を追跡可能にします。

object_properties.label: commit request evaluated by commit gate
object_properties.definition: links a requested side effect to the commit gate that evaluates policy, approval, rollback, sandbox, and disclosure requirements before release.

definitions.en: links a requested side effect to the commit gate that evaluates policy, approval, rollback, sandbox, and disclosure requirements before release.
definitions.zh: 该关系把被请求的副作用连接到提交门，该门在释放前评估策略、批准、回滚、沙箱和披露要求。
definitions.ja: この関係は、要求された副作用を、解放前にポリシー、承認、ロールバック、サンドボックス、開示要件を評価するコミットゲートに結びます。

object_properties.label: compressed into summary
object_properties.definition: links source content or output to the observable summary used to fit a context budget.

definitions.en: links source content or output to the observable summary used to fit a context budget.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: confidence signal qualifies review finding
object_properties.definition: attaches a ConfidenceSignal to a ReviewFinding so uncertainty, confidence, or evidential strength is explicit in review and evaluation flows.

definitions.en: attaches a ConfidenceSignal to a ReviewFinding so uncertainty, confidence, or evidential strength is explicit in review and evaluation flows.
definitions.zh: 该关系把置信信号附着到审查发现，显式表达不确定性或证据强度。
definitions.ja: この関係は、信頼度信号をレビュー所見に付与し、不確実性または証拠強度を明示します。

object_properties.label: conflicts with instruction
object_properties.definition: links two instructions whose requested behavior, scope, or authority cannot both be satisfied.

definitions.en: links two instructions whose requested behavior, scope, or authority cannot both be satisfied.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: constrained by budget
object_properties.definition: links a delegation contract to the token, time, cost, retry, context, or tool-call budget governing delegated work.

definitions.en: links a delegation contract to the token, time, cost, retry, context, or tool-call budget governing delegated work.
definitions.zh: 预算约束关系把委派契约连接到治理委派工作的令牌、时间、成本、重试、上下文或工具调用预算。
definitions.ja: 予算制約関係は、委任契約を、委任作業を統制するトークン、時間、費用、再試行、文脈、道具呼び出し予算へ結びます。

object_properties.label: constrained by runtime budget
object_properties.definition: links an execution attempt to the token, time, cost, retry, tool-call, or context budget that bounded the run.

definitions.en: links an execution attempt to the token, time, cost, retry, tool-call, or context budget that bounded the run.
definitions.zh: 把执行尝试连接到约束本次运行的词元、时间、成本、重试、工具调用或上下文预算。
definitions.ja: 実行試行を、その実行を制約したトークン、時間、費用、再試行、ツール呼び出し、文脈予算へ接続します。

object_properties.label: context assembly applies ordering rule
object_properties.definition: links context assembly to the ordering rule that placed messages, memory, summaries, instructions, and tool results in context.

definitions.en: links context assembly to the ordering rule that placed messages, memory, summaries, instructions, and tool results in context.
definitions.zh: 上下文组装应用排序规则关系把上下文组装连接到放置消息、记忆、摘要、指令和工具结果的排序规则。
definitions.ja: コンテキスト組み立てが順序規則を適用する関係は、メッセージ、記憶、要約、指示、ツール結果を文脈内へ配置した順序規則へコンテキスト組み立てを結び付けます。

object_properties.label: context assembly includes retrieved chunk
object_properties.definition: records that context assembly included a retrieved chunk in the runtime-visible context for a model call or agent step.

definitions.en: records that context assembly included a retrieved chunk in the runtime-visible context for a model call or agent step.
definitions.zh: 上下文组装纳入已检索分块关系记录上下文组装把已检索分块纳入模型调用或智能体步骤的运行可见上下文。
definitions.ja: コンテキスト組み立てが検索済みチャンクを含める関係は、モデル呼び出しまたはエージェントステップの実行可視文脈へ検索済みチャンクを組み込んだことを記録します。

object_properties.label: context assembly uses budget
object_properties.definition: links context assembly to the token, cost, freshness, priority, or window budget that constrained inclusion decisions.

definitions.en: links context assembly to the token, cost, freshness, priority, or window budget that constrained inclusion decisions.
definitions.zh: 上下文组装使用预算关系把上下文组装连接到约束纳入决策的令牌、成本、新鲜度、优先级或窗口预算。
definitions.ja: コンテキスト組み立てが予算を使う関係は、組み込み判断を制約したトークン、コスト、新鮮度、優先度、ウィンドウ予算へコンテキスト組み立てを結び付けます。

object_properties.label: context exclusion excludes chunk
object_properties.definition: records that a context exclusion deliberately omitted, redacted, deferred, or blocked a chunk from visible context.

definitions.en: records that a context exclusion deliberately omitted, redacted, deferred, or blocked a chunk from visible context.
definitions.zh: 上下文排除排除分块关系记录上下文排除故意从可见上下文省略、脱敏、延后或阻止某个分块。
definitions.ja: コンテキスト除外がチャンクを除外する関係は、コンテキスト除外がチャンクを可視文脈から意図的に省略、秘匿化、延期、阻止したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: context window crosses trust boundary
object_properties.definition: links a visible context window to the trust boundary it crosses when content from another actor, zone, tool, memory, or remote agent becomes visible.

definitions.en: links a visible context window to the trust boundary it crosses when content from another actor, zone, tool, memory, or remote agent becomes visible.
definitions.zh: 该关系把可见上下文窗口连接到其跨越的信任边界，表示来自其它参与者、数据区、工具、记忆或远程智能体的内容变为可见。
definitions.ja: この関係は、別の参加者、データ区域、ツール、メモリ、遠隔エージェントからの内容が可視になるとき、可視コンテキストウィンドウを越える信頼境界に結びます。

object_properties.label: controls
object_properties.definition: links an actor, policy, or runtime controller to the object whose behavior it constrains.

definitions.en: links an actor, policy, or runtime controller to the object whose behavior it constrains.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: correction applies to artifact
object_properties.definition: links a Correction action to the Artifact it changes, repairs, revises, replaces, or annotates in response to feedback or failed validation.

definitions.en: links a Correction action to the Artifact it changes, repairs, revises, replaces, or annotates in response to feedback or failed validation.
definitions.zh: 该关系把修正动作连接到被修改、修复或替换的产物。
definitions.ja: この関係は、修正アクションを、変更、修復、置換される成果物へ結びます。

object_properties.label: correction triggered by feedback
object_properties.definition: records the Feedback that triggered a Correction so refinement and remediation can be traced back to the review or diagnostic evidence.

definitions.en: records the Feedback that triggered a Correction so refinement and remediation can be traced back to the review or diagnostic evidence.
definitions.zh: 该关系记录触发修正的反馈。
definitions.ja: この関係は、修正を起動したフィードバックを記録します。

object_properties.label: crosses trust boundary
object_properties.definition: links a boundary-crossing event to the trust boundary crossed by transferred data, control, artifact, message, or authority.

definitions.en: links a boundary-crossing event to the trust boundary crossed by transferred data, control, artifact, message, or authority.
definitions.zh: 该关系把边界穿越事件连接到被数据、控制、产物、消息或权限跨越的信任边界。
definitions.ja: この関係は、境界通過イベントを、データ、制御、成果物、メッセージ、権限が越えた信頼境界に結びます。

object_properties.label: decomposes goal into
object_properties.definition: links a high-level goal to the operational objective that makes the goal measurable, assignable, and traceable.

definitions.en: links a high-level goal to the operational objective that makes the goal measurable, assignable, and traceable.
definitions.zh: 目标分解关系把高层目标连接到使其可度量、可分配、可追踪的可操作目标。
definitions.ja: 目標分解関係は、高位の目標を、測定、割り当て、追跡が可能な操作目的へ結びます。

object_properties.label: delegates
object_properties.definition: links an actor or orchestrator to the agent, worker, or remote participant receiving responsibility.

definitions.en: links an actor or orchestrator to the agent, worker, or remote participant receiving responsibility.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: delegates authority scope
object_properties.definition: links a delegation contract to the authority scope that specifies which tools, memory, data zones, and operations may be used.

definitions.en: links a delegation contract to the authority scope that specifies which tools, memory, data zones, and operations may be used.
definitions.zh: 授权委派关系把委派契约连接到规定可用工具、记忆、数据区域和操作的授权范围。
definitions.ja: 権限委任関係は、委任契約を、使用できる道具、記憶、データ領域、操作を定める権限範囲へ結びます。

object_properties.label: delegates to subagent
object_properties.definition: orchestration relation that assigns scoped work to a subagent under runtime control

definitions.en: orchestration relation that assigns scoped work to a subagent under runtime control
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为编排者，值域为子智能体；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がオーケストレータ、値域がサブエージェントです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: denies action
object_properties.definition: safety relation that blocks a requested action or data flow

definitions.en: safety relation that blocks a requested action or data flow
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为拒绝决策，值域为动作类；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域が拒否判断、値域がアクション類です。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: depends on task
object_properties.definition: links a task step to another task step whose result, approval, resource, or state must exist before it can proceed.

definitions.en: links a task step to another task step whose result, approval, resource, or state must exist before it can proceed.
definitions.zh: 任务依赖关系把某个任务步骤连接到它继续前必须具备结果、批准、资源或状态的另一任务步骤。
definitions.ja: タスク依存関係は、ある手順を、進行前に結果、承認、資源、状態が必要な別の手順へ結びます。

object_properties.label: derived from source
object_properties.definition: links a content block, output segment, or summary to the source reference it was derived from.

definitions.en: links a content block, output segment, or summary to the source reference it was derived from.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: derived from trace event
object_properties.definition: links a context observation to the observable runtime trace event that produced it.

definitions.en: links a context observation to the observable runtime trace event that produced it.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: diagnostic message derived from log record
object_properties.definition: derives a DiagnosticMessage from a LogRecord, preserving the log evidence behind a human-readable debug explanation or remediation hint.

definitions.en: derives a DiagnosticMessage from a LogRecord, preserving the log evidence behind a human-readable debug explanation or remediation hint.
definitions.zh: 该关系从日志记录派生诊断消息，并保留诊断背后的日志证据。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ログ記録から診断メッセージを導き、診断の背後にあるログ証拠を保持します。

object_properties.label: disclosure filter suppresses output window
object_properties.definition: links a disclosure filter to the output window it suppresses or limits because sensitive spans, policy, recipient boundary, or data-zone controls apply.

definitions.en: links a disclosure filter to the output window it suppresses or limits because sensitive spans, policy, recipient boundary, or data-zone controls apply.
definitions.zh: 该关系把披露过滤器连接到其因敏感片段、策略、接收方边界或数据区控制而抑制或限制的输出窗口。
definitions.ja: この関係は、開示フィルタを、機微範囲、ポリシー、受信先境界、データ区域制御により抑制または制限する出力ウィンドウに結びます。

object_properties.label: discovers tool
object_properties.definition: tool relation that retrieves candidate tool definitions from a registry or protocol server

definitions.en: tool relation that retrieves candidate tool definitions from a registry or protocol server
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为工具搜索，值域为工具；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がツール検索、値域がツール定義です。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: displayed to actor
object_properties.definition: links a disclosed output segment to the actor or recipient that can see it.

definitions.en: links a disclosed output segment to the actor or recipient that can see it.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: distributes task to
object_properties.definition: orchestration relation that assigns work to a worker, subagent, route, or tool

definitions.en: orchestration relation that assigns work to a worker, subagent, route, or tool
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为任务分发，值域为智能体参与者；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がタスク分配、値域がエージェント参加者です。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: document attached from source
object_properties.definition: links a memory document to the attached source reference or object that supplied its content, provenance, and trust-boundary evidence.

definitions.en: links a memory document to the attached source reference or object that supplied its content, provenance, and trust-boundary evidence.
definitions.zh: 文档来自来源附件关系把记忆文档连接到提供内容、来源和信任边界证据的附件来源引用或对象。
definitions.ja: 文書が出典添付から来る関係は、記憶文書を内容、来歴、信頼境界証拠を提供した添付出典参照またはオブジェクトへ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: document has document metadata
object_properties.definition: links a memory document to metadata describing source, version, checksum, format, author, timestamp, trust zone, and parsing state.

definitions.en: links a memory document to metadata describing source, version, checksum, format, author, timestamp, trust zone, and parsing state.
definitions.zh: 文档具有文档元数据关系把记忆文档连接到描述来源、版本、校验和、格式、作者、时间戳、信任区域和解析状态的元数据。
definitions.ja: 文書が文書メタデータを持つ関係は、記憶文書を出典、版、チェックサム、形式、作者、時刻、信頼ゾーン、解析状態を記述するメタデータへ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: embedding run embeds chunk
object_properties.definition: records that an embedding run encoded a particular chunk or memory span using a specific embedding model and version.

definitions.en: records that an embedding run encoded a particular chunk or memory span using a specific embedding model and version.
definitions.zh: 嵌入运行编码分块关系记录嵌入运行使用特定嵌入模型和版本编码某个分块或记忆片段。
definitions.ja: 埋め込み実行がチャンクを埋め込む関係は、特定の埋め込みモデルと版を使って特定のチャンクまたは記憶範囲を符号化したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: embedding run produces vector
object_properties.definition: records that an embedding run produced an embedding vector used for similarity search, indexing, clustering, or ranking.

definitions.en: records that an embedding run produced an embedding vector used for similarity search, indexing, clustering, or ranking.
definitions.zh: 嵌入运行产生向量关系记录嵌入运行产生用于相似度搜索、索引、聚类或排序的嵌入向量。
definitions.ja: 埋め込み実行がベクトルを生成する関係は、類似検索、索引付け、クラスタリング、順位付けに使われる埋め込みベクトルを埋め込み実行が生成したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: embeds chunk
object_properties.definition: memory relation that maps a chunk to a vector representation

definitions.en: memory relation that maps a chunk to a vector representation
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为嵌入模型，值域为嵌入；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域が埋め込みモデル、値域が埋め込みです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: emits conversion warning
object_properties.definition: links a mapping rule to the conversion warning emitted when an adapter mapping loses information, approximates semantics, encounters unsupported features, or requires review.

definitions.en: links a mapping rule to the conversion warning emitted when an adapter mapping loses information, approximates semantics, encounters unsupported features, or requires review.
definitions.zh: 该关系把映射规则连接到适配映射在信息丢失、语义近似、遇到不支持特性或需要审查时发出的转换警告。
definitions.ja: この関係は、アダプタ写像が情報を失う、意味を近似する、未対応機能に遭遇する、またはレビューを必要とするときに発行される変換警告へ写像規則を接続します。

object_properties.label: emits trace event
object_properties.definition: runtime relation that records an observable event in the session trace

definitions.en: runtime relation that records an observable event in the session trace
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为运行会话，值域为轨迹事件；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域が実行セッション、値域がトレースイベントです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: error event classified by failure mode
object_properties.definition: classifies an ErrorEvent with a recurring FailureMode so diagnostics, recovery plans, evaluation metrics, and future prevention can share the same failure taxonomy.

definitions.en: classifies an ErrorEvent with a recurring FailureMode so diagnostics, recovery plans, evaluation metrics, and future prevention can share the same failure taxonomy.
definitions.zh: 该关系用失败模式分类错误事件，使诊断、恢复和评估共享失败分类。
definitions.ja: この関係は、エラーイベントを失敗モードで分類し、診断、復旧、評価で失敗分類を共有できるようにします。

object_properties.label: escalates
object_properties.definition: links a safety, review, or runtime event to a higher-authority decision path.

definitions.en: links a safety, review, or runtime event to a higher-authority decision path.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: evaluation run produces score
object_properties.definition: records the Score produced by an EvaluationRun for a metric, rubric criterion, success condition, or reviewed behavior.

definitions.en: records the Score produced by an EvaluationRun for a metric, rubric criterion, success condition, or reviewed behavior.
definitions.zh: 该关系记录评估运行产生的分数。
definitions.ja: この関係は、評価実行が生成したスコアを記録します。

object_properties.label: evaluation run uses rubric
object_properties.definition: connects an EvaluationRun to the Rubric that defines criteria, weights, thresholds, and interpretation rules for the assessment episode.

definitions.en: connects an EvaluationRun to the Rubric that defines criteria, weights, thresholds, and interpretation rules for the assessment episode.
definitions.zh: 该关系把评估运行连接到定义准则、权重和阈值的评分规程。
definitions.ja: この関係は、評価実行を、基準、重み、閾値を定めるルーブリックへ結びます。

object_properties.label: excluded from context
object_properties.definition: links a selection decision to content that was intentionally omitted, suppressed, deferred, or blocked.

definitions.en: links a selection decision to content that was intentionally omitted, suppressed, deferred, or blocked.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: executes in sandbox
object_properties.definition: safety relation that confines a command or tool execution to an isolated boundary

definitions.en: safety relation that confines a command or tool execution to an isolated boundary
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为沙箱命令，值域为沙箱；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がサンドボックスコマンド、値域がサンドボックスです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: feedback derived from review finding
object_properties.definition: derives Feedback from a ReviewFinding so critique, approval, requested changes, or reprioritization can be consumed by control and learning loops.

definitions.en: derives Feedback from a ReviewFinding so critique, approval, requested changes, or reprioritization can be consumed by control and learning loops.
definitions.zh: 该关系从审查发现派生反馈，使反馈能进入控制和学习循环。
definitions.ja: この関係は、レビュー所見からフィードバックを導き、制御と学習のループへ渡せるようにします。

object_properties.label: feedback event carries feedback
object_properties.definition: connects an orchestration FeedbackEvent to the Feedback evidence it carries into a control loop, preserving the distinction between signal and routing event.

definitions.en: connects an orchestration FeedbackEvent to the Feedback evidence it carries into a control loop, preserving the distinction between signal and routing event.
definitions.zh: 该关系把编排反馈事件连接到其携带的反馈证据。
definitions.ja: この関係は、オーケストレーション上のフィードバックイベントを、それが運ぶフィードバック証拠へ結びます。

object_properties.label: feedback event informs policy decision
object_properties.definition: links a FeedbackEvent to the PolicyDecision it informs when feedback contains safety, risk, trust-boundary, or permission-relevant evidence.

definitions.en: links a FeedbackEvent to the PolicyDecision it informs when feedback contains safety, risk, trust-boundary, or permission-relevant evidence.
definitions.zh: 该关系把反馈事件连接到它提供安全、风险或权限证据的策略决策。
definitions.ja: この関係は、フィードバックイベントを、安全、リスク、権限の証拠を提供するポリシー判断へ結びます。

object_properties.label: feedback event targets optimization loop
object_properties.definition: targets a FeedbackEvent at the OptimizationLoop that will consume feedback, metrics, or review findings for bounded improvement.

definitions.en: targets a FeedbackEvent at the OptimizationLoop that will consume feedback, metrics, or review findings for bounded improvement.
definitions.zh: 该关系把反馈事件定向到消费反馈、指标或审查发现的优化循环。
definitions.ja: この関係は、フィードバックイベントを、フィードバック、指標、レビュー所見を消費する最適化ループへ向けます。

object_properties.label: feedback event targets route
object_properties.definition: targets a FeedbackEvent at the Route whose downstream branch, handler, stop path, or retry path should change in response to feedback.

definitions.en: targets a FeedbackEvent at the Route whose downstream branch, handler, stop path, or retry path should change in response to feedback.
definitions.zh: 该关系把反馈事件定向到需要改变分支、处理器或停止路径的路由。
definitions.ja: この関係は、フィードバックイベントを、分岐、処理先、停止経路を変えるべき経路へ向けます。

object_properties.label: feedback event targets task
object_properties.definition: targets a FeedbackEvent at the Task whose plan, priority, acceptance state, or retry path should change in response to feedback.

definitions.en: targets a FeedbackEvent at the Task whose plan, priority, acceptance state, or retry path should change in response to feedback.
definitions.zh: 该关系把反馈事件定向到需要改变计划、优先级或重试路径的任务。
definitions.ja: この関係は、フィードバックイベントを、計画、優先順位、再試行経路を変えるべきタスクへ向けます。

object_properties.label: feedback event targets worker
object_properties.definition: targets a FeedbackEvent at the WorkerAgent whose assignment, review duty, retry work, or future selection should change in response to feedback.

definitions.en: targets a FeedbackEvent at the WorkerAgent whose assignment, review duty, retry work, or future selection should change in response to feedback.
definitions.zh: 该关系把反馈事件定向到需要改变分配、审查职责或未来选择的工作者。
definitions.ja: この関係は、フィードバックイベントを、割当、レビュー責任、将来選択を変えるべきワーカーへ向けます。

object_properties.label: telemetry, audit and export pipeline module contains
object_properties.definition: declares audit log and sibling terms as members of the Telemetry, Audit And Export Pipeline module scope.

definitions.en: declares audit log and sibling terms as members of the Telemetry, Audit And Export Pipeline module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系声明审计日志及其同级术语属于遥测、审计与导出管线模块的范围。
definitions.ja: この関係は、監査ログおよび同階層の用語がテレメトリ、監査、エクスポートパイプラインモジュールの範囲に属することを示します。

object_properties.label: metrics and evaluation module contains
object_properties.definition: declares cost metric and sibling terms as members of the Metrics And Evaluation module scope.

definitions.en: declares cost metric and sibling terms as members of the Metrics And Evaluation module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系声明成本指标及其同级术语属于指标与评估模块的范围。
definitions.ja: この関係は、コスト指標および同階層の用語が指標と評価モジュールの範囲に属することを示します。

object_properties.label: review and optimization module contains
object_properties.definition: declares automated review and sibling terms as members of the Review And Optimization module scope.

definitions.en: declares automated review and sibling terms as members of the Review And Optimization module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系声明自动审查及其同级术语属于审查与优化模块的范围。
definitions.ja: この関係は、自動レビューおよび同階層の用語がレビューと最適化モジュールの範囲に属することを示します。

object_properties.label: warning and error module contains
object_properties.definition: declares blocking error and sibling terms as members of the Warning And Error module scope.

definitions.en: declares blocking error and sibling terms as members of the Warning And Error module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系声明阻断错误及其同级术语属于警告与错误模块的范围。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ブロッキングエラーおよび同階層の用語が警告とエラーモジュールの範囲に属することを示します。

object_properties.label: feeds back to
object_properties.definition: legacy summary relation for feedback returning into a control loop; use precise feedback_event_targets_task, feedback_event_targets_route, feedback_event_targets_worker, feedback_event_targets_optimization_loop, learning_signal_updates_memory_preference, learning_signal_updates_routing_policy, or learning_signal_updates_tool_selection for typed feedback-flow edges.

definitions.en: legacy summary relation for feedback returning into a control loop; use precise feedback_event_targets_task, feedback_event_targets_route, feedback_event_targets_worker, feedback_event_targets_optimization_loop, learning_signal_updates_memory_preference, learning_signal_updates_routing_policy, or learning_signal_updates_tool_selection for typed feedback-flow edges.
definitions.zh: 旧版摘要关系，表示反馈回到控制循环；字段级建模应使用定向到任务、路由、工作者、优化循环、记忆偏好、路由策略或工具选择的具体反馈关系。
definitions.ja: 旧来の要約関係で、フィードバックが制御ループへ戻ることを表します。フィールド単位のモデルでは、タスク、経路、ワーカー、最適化ループ、記憶嗜好、経路ポリシー、ツール選択へ向かう具体的なフィードバック関係を使います。

object_properties.label: follows
object_properties.definition: orders observable events when one event occurs after another in a run, task, or protocol flow.

definitions.en: orders observable events when one event occurs after another in a run, task, or protocol flow.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: generates
object_properties.definition: links an event or action to the artifact, result, trace, warning, or resource it produces.

definitions.en: links an event or action to the artifact, result, trace, warning, or resource it produces.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: has access path
object_properties.definition: links a source reference to the permitted path or handle used to retrieve it under policy.

definitions.en: links a source reference to the permitted path or handle used to retrieve it under policy.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: has actor authority scope
object_properties.definition: links a runtime actor to the authority scope bounding permitted tools, operations, resources, data zones, and boundaries.

definitions.en: links a runtime actor to the authority scope bounding permitted tools, operations, resources, data zones, and boundaries.
definitions.zh: 把运行参与者连接到限定其可用工具、操作、资源、数据区域和边界的权限范围。
definitions.ja: 実行アクターを、許可されたツール、操作、資源、データ領域、境界を制限する権限範囲へ接続します。

object_properties.label: has actor capability binding
object_properties.definition: links a runtime actor to the callable, observable, generation, retrieval, ranking, or review capability it may use under stated conditions.

definitions.en: links a runtime actor to the callable, observable, generation, retrieval, ranking, or review capability it may use under stated conditions.
definitions.zh: 把运行参与者连接到其在指定条件下可使用的调用、观察、生成、检索、排序或审查能力。
definitions.ja: 実行アクターを、定められた条件下で使える呼び出し、観測、生成、検索、順位付け、レビュー能力へ接続します。

object_properties.label: has actor role binding
object_properties.definition: links a runtime actor to the role assignment that explains its delegated responsibility, review duty, approval authority, or accountability.

definitions.en: links a runtime actor to the role assignment that explains its delegated responsibility, review duty, approval authority, or accountability.
definitions.zh: 把运行参与者连接到说明其委派责任、审查职责、批准权限或问责范围的角色绑定。

object_properties.definition: links an observable context-ingress event to the context package made visible to a model call or agent step.

definitions.en: links an observable context-ingress event to the context package made visible to a model call or agent step.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: ingestion run loads document
object_properties.definition: records that an ingestion run loaded, parsed, or normalized a document before it became available for memory storage, chunking, indexing, or citation.

definitions.en: records that an ingestion run loaded, parsed, or normalized a document before it became available for memory storage, chunking, indexing, or citation.
definitions.zh: 摄入运行加载文档关系记录摄入运行在文档进入记忆存储、分块、索引或引用前加载、解析或规范化该文档。
definitions.ja: 取り込み実行が文書を読み込む関係は、文書が記憶保存、チャンク化、索引付け、引用に使えるようになる前に、取り込み実行が文書を読み込み、解析、正規化したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: ingestion run writes to memory store
object_properties.definition: records that an ingestion run wrote accepted source material into a memory store under ingestion policy, provenance, and deduplication controls.

definitions.en: records that an ingestion run wrote accepted source material into a memory store under ingestion policy, provenance, and deduplication controls.
definitions.zh: 摄入运行写入记忆库关系记录摄入运行在摄入策略、来源和去重控制下把已接受来源材料写入记忆库。
definitions.ja: 取り込み実行が記憶ストアへ書き込む関係は、取り込み方針、来歴、重複排除制御の下で受け入れられた出典素材が記憶ストアに書き込まれたことを記録します。

object_properties.label: instruction flagged as prompt injection
object_properties.definition: links an instruction or instruction-like candidate to the prompt-injection signal that explains the attempted override, manipulation, exfiltration, or policy bypass.

definitions.en: links an instruction or instruction-like candidate to the prompt-injection signal that explains the attempted override, manipulation, exfiltration, or policy bypass.
definitions.zh: 该关系把指令或指令候选连接到解释其覆盖可信指令、操纵行为、外泄数据或绕过策略尝试的提示注入信号。
definitions.ja: この関係は、指示または指示候補を、信頼済み指示の上書き、操作、持ち出し、ポリシー回避の試みを説明するプロンプト注入信号に結びます。

object_properties.label: invokes
object_properties.definition: links an action event to the tool, function, service, or execution surface being called.

definitions.en: links an action event to the tool, function, service, or execution surface being called.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: invokes tool
object_properties.definition: tool relation that calls a selected tool with arguments

definitions.en: tool relation that calls a selected tool with arguments
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为工具调用，值域为工具；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がツール呼び出し、値域がツールです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: is a
object_properties.definition: DAG relation that states that a child term is a subtype of a parent term

definitions.en: DAG relation that states that a child term is a subtype of a parent term
definitions.zh: 是其子类是类型层级关系，定义域为任意实体，值域为任意实体；声明子术语是父术语的更具体类型，并用于构成有向无环分类层级。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: 下位型であるは型階層関係で、定義域は任意エンティティ、値域は任意エンティティです。子用語が親用語のより具体的な型であることを示し、有向非循環分類階層を構成する。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: is part of
object_properties.definition: links an agent-system component back to the larger structure that contains it.

definitions.en: links an agent-system component back to the larger structure that contains it.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: isolates context for
object_properties.definition: links a context-isolation policy to the subagent whose visible messages, tools, memory, and sources are scoped by it.

definitions.en: links a context-isolation policy to the subagent whose visible messages, tools, memory, and sources are scoped by it.
definitions.zh: 上下文隔离关系把隔离策略连接到受其限定可见消息、工具、记忆和来源的子智能体。
definitions.ja: 文脈隔離関係は、隔離ポリシーを、その可視メッセージ、道具、記憶、出典が範囲づけられるサブエージェントへ結びます。

object_properties.label: learning signal derived from feedback
object_properties.definition: derives a LearningSignal from Feedback so future memory, routing, tool selection, or policy behavior can change without storing hidden reasoning.

definitions.en: derives a LearningSignal from Feedback so future memory, routing, tool selection, or policy behavior can change without storing hidden reasoning.
definitions.zh: 该关系从反馈派生学习信号，并避免存储隐藏推理文本。
definitions.ja: この関係は、フィードバックから学習信号を導き、隠れた推論テキストを保存しないことを保ちます。

object_properties.label: learning signal updates memory preference
object_properties.definition: records that a LearningSignal updates a MemoryPreference used for retrieval, persistence, summarization, or future context assembly.

definitions.en: records that a LearningSignal updates a MemoryPreference used for retrieval, persistence, summarization, or future context assembly.
definitions.zh: 该关系说明学习信号更新用于检索、持久化或上下文组装的记忆偏好。
definitions.ja: この関係は、学習信号が検索、永続化、文脈組み立てに使う記憶嗜好を更新することを示します。

object_properties.label: learning signal updates routing policy
object_properties.definition: records that a LearningSignal updates a RoutingPolicy used by orchestration to choose routes, workers, retries, or stop paths.

definitions.en: records that a LearningSignal updates a RoutingPolicy used by orchestration to choose routes, workers, retries, or stop paths.
definitions.zh: 该关系说明学习信号更新编排路由策略。
definitions.ja: この関係は、学習信号がオーケストレーションの経路ポリシーを更新することを示します。

object_properties.label: learning signal updates tool selection
object_properties.definition: records that a LearningSignal updates a ToolSelectionDecision or its future selection criteria, fallback behavior, or ranking policy.

definitions.en: records that a LearningSignal updates a ToolSelectionDecision or its future selection criteria, fallback behavior, or ranking policy.
definitions.zh: 该关系说明学习信号更新工具选择决策或未来选择准则。
definitions.ja: この関係は、学習信号がツール選択判断または将来の選択基準を更新することを示します。

object_properties.label: log listener subscribes to stream
object_properties.definition: connects a LogListener to the LogStream it observes so diagnostics, metrics, review, or audit pipelines can consume selected records.

definitions.en: connects a LogListener to the LogStream it observes so diagnostics, metrics, review, or audit pipelines can consume selected records.
definitions.zh: 该关系把日志监听器连接到它观察和路由的日志流。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ログリスナーを、それが観測し経路付けるログストリームへ結びます。

object_properties.label: log record appended to audit log
object_properties.definition: appends a structured LogRecord to an AuditLog collection so the record becomes reviewable evidence with ordering, retention, and disclosure context.

definitions.en: appends a structured LogRecord to an AuditLog collection so the record becomes reviewable evidence with ordering, retention, and disclosure context.
definitions.zh: 该关系把结构化日志记录追加到可审查的审计日志集合。
definitions.ja: この関係は、構造化ログ記録をレビュー可能な監査ログ集合へ追加します。

object_properties.label: log stream carries log record
object_properties.definition: connects an ordered LogStream to the LogRecord entries it carries from runtime, tool, protocol, sandbox, or feedback instrumentation.

definitions.en: connects an ordered LogStream to the LogRecord entries it carries from runtime, tool, protocol, sandbox, or feedback instrumentation.
definitions.zh: 该关系说明日志流承载来自运行、工具、协议或反馈插桩的日志记录。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ログストリームが実行、ツール、プロトコル、フィードバック計装からのログ記録を運ぶことを示します。

object_properties.label: log stream delivered to event sink
object_properties.definition: delivers an ordered LogStream to an EventSink destination for storage, monitoring, forwarding, audit review, or external observability export.

definitions.en: delivers an ordered LogStream to an EventSink destination for storage, monitoring, forwarding, audit review, or external observability export.
definitions.zh: 该关系把日志流投递到用于存储、监控、审查或转发的事件接收端。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ログストリームを保存、監視、レビュー、転送用のイベントシンクへ届けます。

object_properties.label: log subscription registers listener
object_properties.definition: records that a LogSubscription registers a LogListener to receive a filtered telemetry, diagnostic, audit, or log stream.

definitions.en: records that a LogSubscription registers a LogListener to receive a filtered telemetry, diagnostic, audit, or log stream.
definitions.zh: 该关系说明日志订阅为过滤后的遥测、诊断或审计流登记监听器。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ログ購読がフィルタ済みテレメトリ、診断、監査ストリームのリスナーを登録することを示します。

object_properties.label: long-term memory materializes record
object_properties.definition: links long-term memory to a durable record retained beyond one run under namespace, validation, retention, and scope controls.

definitions.en: links long-term memory to a durable record retained beyond one run under namespace, validation, retention, and scope controls.
definitions.zh: 长期记忆实现记录关系把长期记忆连接到在命名空间、验证、保留和范围控制下跨运行保留的持久记录。
definitions.ja: 長期記憶がレコードを具現化する関係は、長期記憶を名前空間、検証、保持、スコープ制御の下で一つの実行を越えて保持される永続レコードへ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: maps benchmark score to metric
object_properties.definition: links a benchmark adapter to the canonical Metric term used when benchmark scores, success rates, grading checks, rubrics, or pressure axes are represented as evaluation evidence.

definitions.en: links a benchmark adapter to the canonical Metric term used when benchmark scores, success rates, grading checks, rubrics, or pressure axes are represented as evaluation evidence.
definitions.zh: 该关系把基准适配器连接到规范指标术语，用于把基准分数、成功率、评分检查、评审规则或压力轴表示为评估证据。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ベンチマークアダプタを標準指標用語へ接続し、ベンチマークスコア、成功率、採点確認、評価規則、負荷軸を評価証拠として表すときに使います。

object_properties.label: maps canonical term to external construct
object_properties.definition: links a mapping rule from a canonical ontology term to the external protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema, export, or frontend construct it projects into.

definitions.en: links a mapping rule from a canonical ontology term to the external protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema, export, or frontend construct it projects into.
definitions.zh: 该关系把映射规则从规范本体术语连接到它投影进入的外部协议、框架、基准、状态图、模式、导出或前端构造。
definitions.ja: この関係は、写像規則を、標準オントロジー用語から投影先の外部プロトコル、フレームワーク、ベンチマーク、状態図、スキーマ、エクスポート、フロントエンド構成へ接続します。

object_properties.label: maps external construct to canonical
object_properties.definition: links a mapping rule from an external protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema, export, or frontend construct to the canonical ontology term it aligns with.

definitions.en: links a mapping rule from an external protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema, export, or frontend construct to the canonical ontology term it aligns with.
definitions.zh: 该关系把映射规则连接到外部协议、框架、基准、状态图、模式、导出或前端构造所对齐的规范本体术语。
definitions.ja: この関係は、写像規則を、外部プロトコル、フレームワーク、ベンチマーク、状態図、スキーマ、エクスポート、フロントエンド構成が対応する標準オントロジー用語へ接続します。

object_properties.label: maps external term to
object_properties.definition: legacy adapter summary relation that links an external protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, or schema term to a canonical ontology term; use maps_external_construct_to_canonical for precise directional mapping records.

definitions.en: legacy adapter summary relation that links an external protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, or schema term to a canonical ontology term; use maps_external_construct_to_canonical for precise directional mapping records.
definitions.zh: 旧适配摘要关系把外部协议、框架、基准、状态图或模式术语连接到规范本体术语；精确的方向性映射应使用外部构造到规范术语的映射记录。
definitions.ja: 旧来のアダプタ要約関係は、外部プロトコル、フレームワーク、ベンチマーク、状態図、またはスキーマ用語を標準本体用語へ接続します。精密な方向付き写像には、外部構成から標準用語への写像記録を使います。

object_properties.label: maps framework handoff to canonical handoff
object_properties.definition: links a framework handoff mapping to the canonical Handoff term used for framework-native handoff, delegation, responsibility transfer, and ownership semantics.

definitions.en: links a framework handoff mapping to the canonical Handoff term used for framework-native handoff, delegation, responsibility transfer, and ownership semantics.
definitions.zh: 该关系把框架交接映射连接到规范交接术语，用于框架原生交接、委派、责任转移和归属语义。
definitions.ja: この関係は、フレームワーク引き継ぎ写像を標準引き継ぎ用語へ接続し、フレームワーク固有の引き継ぎ、委任、責任移転、帰属意味を扱います。

object_properties.label: maps framework trace to trace record
object_properties.definition: links a framework trace mapping to the canonical TraceRecord term used for framework-native runs, traces, spans, streams, checkpoints, and observable events.

definitions.en: links a framework trace mapping to the canonical TraceRecord term used for framework-native runs, traces, spans, streams, checkpoints, and observable events.
definitions.zh: 该关系把框架轨迹映射连接到规范追踪记录术语，用于框架原生运行、追踪、跨度、流、检查点和可观察事件。
definitions.ja: この関係は、フレームワークトレース写像を標準トレース記録用語へ接続し、フレームワーク固有の実行、トレース、スパン、ストリーム、チェックポイント、観測可能イベントを扱います。

object_properties.label: maps protocol capability to canonical capability
object_properties.definition: links a protocol capability mapping to the canonical ToolCapability term used for external tool, resource, prompt, service, or agent capability advertisements.

definitions.en: links a protocol capability mapping to the canonical ToolCapability term used for external tool, resource, prompt, service, or agent capability advertisements.
definitions.zh: 该关系把协议能力映射连接到规范工具能力术语，用于外部工具、资源、提示、服务或智能体能力声明。
definitions.ja: この関係は、プロトコル能力写像を標準ツール能力用語へ接続し、外部ツール、資源、プロンプト、サービス、エージェント能力広告を扱います。

object_properties.label: maps protocol message to canonical message
object_properties.definition: links a protocol message mapping to the canonical Message term used for protocol-native envelopes, performatives, task messages, or tool-context messages.

definitions.en: links a protocol message mapping to the canonical Message term used for protocol-native envelopes, performatives, task messages, or tool-context messages.
definitions.zh: 该关系把协议消息映射连接到规范消息术语，用于承接协议原生包络、行为词、任务消息或工具上下文消息。
definitions.ja: この関係は、プロトコルメッセージ写像を標準メッセージ用語へ接続し、プロトコル固有の包絡、発話行為、タスクメッセージ、ツール文脈メッセージを扱います。

object_properties.label: maps protocol task to canonical task
object_properties.definition: links a protocol task mapping to the canonical Task term used for protocol-native task lifecycle, delegation, or request records.

definitions.en: links a protocol task mapping to the canonical Task term used for protocol-native task lifecycle, delegation, or request records.
definitions.zh: 该关系把协议任务映射连接到规范任务术语，用于协议原生任务生命周期、委派或请求记录。
definitions.ja: この関係は、プロトコルタスク写像を標準タスク用語へ接続し、プロトコル固有のタスクライフサイクル、委任、要求記録を扱います。

object_properties.label: maps protocol trust to trust boundary
object_properties.definition: links a protocol trust mapping to the canonical TrustBoundary term used for identity, authorization, opacity, remote-agent, or protected-resource metadata.

definitions.en: links a protocol trust mapping to the canonical TrustBoundary term used for identity, authorization, opacity, remote-agent, or protected-resource metadata.
definitions.zh: 该关系把协议信任映射连接到规范信任边界术语，用于身份、授权、不透明性、远程智能体或受保护资源元数据。
definitions.ja: この関係は、プロトコル信頼写像を標準信頼境界用語へ接続し、識別、認可、不透明性、遠隔エージェント、保護資源メタデータを扱います。

object_properties.label: maps schema profile to schema artifact
object_properties.definition: links a schema adapter to the canonical SchemaArtifact term used for JSON Schema, OWL, SHACL, ShEx, Zod, Pydantic, Graph IR, or frontend projection outputs.

definitions.en: links a schema adapter to the canonical SchemaArtifact term used for JSON Schema, OWL, SHACL, ShEx, Zod, Pydantic, Graph IR, or frontend projection outputs.
definitions.zh: 该关系把模式适配器连接到规范模式产物术语，用于 JSON Schema、OWL、SHACL、ShEx、Zod、Pydantic、图谱中间表示或前端投影输出。
definitions.ja: この関係は、スキーマアダプタを標準スキーマ成果物用語へ接続し、JSON Schema、OWL、SHACL、ShEx、Zod、Pydantic、グラフ中間表現、フロントエンド投影出力を扱います。

object_properties.label: maps statechart state to snapshot
object_properties.definition: links a statechart adapter to the canonical StateSnapshot term used when state-machine states, snapshots, or lifecycle positions are projected into runtime state profiles.

definitions.en: links a statechart adapter to the canonical StateSnapshot term used when state-machine states, snapshots, or lifecycle positions are projected into runtime state profiles.
definitions.zh: 该关系把状态图适配器连接到规范状态快照术语，用于状态机状态、快照或生命周期位置投影到运行状态剖面时的映射。
definitions.ja: この関係は、状態図アダプタを標準状態スナップショット用語へ接続し、状態機械の状態、スナップショット、ライフサイクル位置を実行状態プロファイルへ投影するときに使います。

object_properties.label: maps to
object_properties.definition: legacy summary relation linking adapter family records to canonical terms; precise directional mapping is represented by maps_external_construct_to_canonical and maps_canonical_term_to_external_construct.

definitions.en: legacy summary relation linking adapter family records to canonical terms; precise directional mapping is represented by maps_external_construct_to_canonical and maps_canonical_term_to_external_construct.
definitions.zh: 旧摘要关系把适配器家族记录连接到规范术语；精确的方向性映射由外部构造到规范术语、规范术语到外部构造两类关系表达。
definitions.ja: 旧来の要約関係はアダプタファミリ記録を標準用語へ接続します。厳密な方向付き写像は、外部構成から標準用語への関係、および標準用語から外部構成への関係で表します。

object_properties.label: matches tool
object_properties.definition: tool relation that chooses a tool definition for a task or generated call

definitions.en: tool relation that chooses a tool definition for a task or generated call
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为工具匹配，值域为工具；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がツール照合、値域がツールです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: MCP authorization authorizes prompt get
object_properties.definition: authorizes an MCP prompt retrieval request using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.

definitions.en: authorizes an MCP prompt retrieval request using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.
definitions.zh: 用协议侧同意、授权、审批、范围、受保护资源或宿主策略元数据授权 MCP 提示获取请求。
definitions.ja: プロトコル側の同意、付与、承認、スコープ、保護資源、ホストポリシーメタデータにより MCP プロンプト取得要求を認可します。

object_properties.label: MCP authorization authorizes resource read
object_properties.definition: authorizes an MCP resource read request using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.

definitions.en: authorizes an MCP resource read request using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.
definitions.zh: 用协议侧同意、授权、审批、范围、受保护资源或宿主策略元数据授权 MCP 资源读取请求。
definitions.ja: プロトコル側の同意、付与、承認、スコープ、保護資源、ホストポリシーメタデータにより MCP リソース読み取り要求を認可します。

object_properties.label: MCP authorization authorizes tool call
object_properties.definition: authorizes an MCP tool call using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.

definitions.en: authorizes an MCP tool call using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.
definitions.zh: 用协议侧同意、授权、审批、范围、受保护资源或宿主策略元数据授权 MCP 工具调用。
definitions.ja: プロトコル側の同意、付与、承認、スコープ、保護資源、ホストポリシーメタデータにより MCP ツール呼び出しを認可します。

object_properties.label: MCP authorization maps to authorization grant
object_properties.definition: links MCP authorization metadata or flow output to the canonical authorization grant that records scope, actor, resource, expiry, and audit basis.

definitions.en: links MCP authorization metadata or flow output to the canonical authorization grant that records scope, actor, resource, expiry, and audit basis.
definitions.zh: 该关系把 MCP 授权元数据或授权流程输出连接到记录范围、参与者、资源、失效时间和审计依据的规范授权授予。
definitions.ja: この関係は、MCP認可メタデータまたはフロー出力を、範囲、参加者、リソース、有効期限、監査根拠を記録する標準認可付与に結びます。

object_properties.label: MCP client opens session
object_properties.definition: links an MCP client to the session it opens with a server for capability discovery, authorization, tool calls, resource reads, prompts, and elicitation.

definitions.en: links an MCP client to the session it opens with a server for capability discovery, authorization, tool calls, resource reads, prompts, and elicitation.
definitions.zh: 把 MCP 客户端连接到它与服务器打开的会话，用于能力发现、授权、工具调用、资源读取、提示和补充信息请求。
definitions.ja: MCP クライアントを、能力発見、認可、ツール呼び出し、リソース読み取り、プロンプト、追加情報要求のためにサーバーと開くセッションへ接続します。

object_properties.label: MCP elicitation requests additional input
object_properties.definition: records that MCP elicitation requests additional input from a user or client before the server can continue a protocol interaction.

definitions.en: records that MCP elicitation requests additional input from a user or client before the server can continue a protocol interaction.
definitions.zh: 记录 MCP 补充信息请求 在服务器继续协议交互前向用户或客户端请求补充输入。
definitions.ja: MCP 追加情報要求 が、サーバーがプロトコル対話を続ける前にユーザーまたはクライアントへ追加入力を求めることを記録します。

object_properties.label: MCP prompt list contains prompt definition
object_properties.definition: contains a prompt definition in an MCP prompt list, preserving the distinction between prompt discovery and instantiated prompt messages.

definitions.en: contains a prompt definition in an MCP prompt list, preserving the distinction between prompt discovery and instantiated prompt messages.
definitions.zh: 表示 MCP 提示列表包含某个提示定义，并保持提示发现和已实例化提示消息之间的区别。
definitions.ja: MCP プロンプト一覧がプロンプト定義を含むことを示し、プロンプト発見とインスタンス化済みプロンプトメッセージの区別を保ちます。

object_properties.label: MCP resource list contains resource definition
object_properties.definition: contains a resource definition in an MCP resource list, preserving the distinction between resource discovery and resource read results.

definitions.en: contains a resource definition in an MCP resource list, preserving the distinction between resource discovery and resource read results.
definitions.zh: 表示 MCP 资源列表包含某个资源定义，并保持资源发现和资源读取结果之间的区别。
definitions.ja: MCP リソース一覧がリソース定義を含むことを示し、リソース発見とリソース読み取り結果の区別を保ちます。

object_properties.label: MCP server exposes prompt list
object_properties.definition: exposes the server-side MCP prompt list from an MCP server so clients can retrieve reusable prompt definitions and templates.

definitions.en: exposes the server-side MCP prompt list from an MCP server so clients can retrieve reusable prompt definitions and templates.
definitions.zh: 表示 MCP 服务器暴露服务器侧提示列表，使客户端能获取可复用提示定义和模板。
definitions.ja: MCP サーバーがサーバー側のプロンプト一覧を公開し、クライアントが再利用可能なプロンプト定義とテンプレートを取得できるようにします。

object_properties.label: MCP server exposes resource list
object_properties.definition: exposes the server-side MCP resource list from an MCP server so clients can discover readable or subscribable context/data resources.

definitions.en: exposes the server-side MCP resource list from an MCP server so clients can discover readable or subscribable context/data resources.
definitions.zh: 表示 MCP 服务器暴露服务器侧资源列表，使客户端能发现可读取或可订阅的上下文/数据资源。
definitions.ja: MCP サーバーがサーバー側のリソース一覧を公開し、クライアントが読み取り可能または購読可能な文脈/データ資源を発見できるようにします。

object_properties.label: MCP server exposes tool list
object_properties.definition: exposes the server-side MCP tool list from an MCP server so clients can discover callable tool definitions and capability descriptors.

definitions.en: exposes the server-side MCP tool list from an MCP server so clients can discover callable tool definitions and capability descriptors.
definitions.zh: 表示 MCP 服务器暴露服务器侧工具列表，使客户端能发现可调用工具定义和能力描述符。
definitions.ja: MCP サーバーがサーバー側のツール一覧を公開し、クライアントが呼び出し可能なツール定義と能力記述子を発見できるようにします。

object_properties.label: MCP session uses transport
object_properties.definition: links an MCP session to the transport channel used to exchange protocol messages, requests, responses, and capability metadata.

definitions.en: links an MCP session to the transport channel used to exchange protocol messages, requests, responses, and capability metadata.
definitions.zh: 把 MCP 会话连接到用于交换协议消息、请求、响应和能力元数据的传输通道。
definitions.ja: MCP セッションを、プロトコルメッセージ、要求、応答、能力メタデータを交換するトランスポート経路へ接続します。

object_properties.label: memory audit event records memory operation
object_properties.definition: links a memory audit event to the memory record read, written, updated, validated, deleted, exported, or reused.

definitions.en: links a memory audit event to the memory record read, written, updated, validated, deleted, exported, or reused.
definitions.zh: 记忆审计事件记录记忆操作关系把记忆审计事件连接到被读取、写入、更新、验证、删除、导出或复用的记忆记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶監査イベントが記憶操作を記録する関係は、記憶監査イベントを読み取り、書き込み、更新、検証、削除、エクスポート、再利用された記憶レコードへ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: chunking and situating module contains
object_properties.definition: declares chunk and sibling terms as members of the Chunking And Situating module scope.

definitions.en: declares chunk and sibling terms as members of the Chunking And Situating module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

object_properties.label: memory compaction compacts record
object_properties.definition: records that memory compaction shortened or folded a memory record while preserving source anchors and retrieval utility.

definitions.en: records that memory compaction shortened or folded a memory record while preserving source anchors and retrieval utility.
definitions.zh: 记忆压缩压缩记录关系记录记忆压缩在保留来源锚点和检索效用的同时缩短或折叠记忆记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶圧縮がレコードを圧縮する関係は、出典アンカーと検索有用性を保ちながら記憶レコードを短縮または折り畳んだことを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory conflict flags record
object_properties.definition: links a memory conflict to the record whose claim, preference, policy, source, or instruction contradicts another active memory or current context.

definitions.en: links a memory conflict to the record whose claim, preference, policy, source, or instruction contradicts another active memory or current context.
definitions.zh: 记忆冲突标记记录关系把记忆冲突连接到其主张、偏好、策略、来源或指令与另一活动记忆或当前上下文矛盾的记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶衝突がレコードを標識する関係は、主張、選好、方針、出典、指示が別のアクティブ記憶または現在の文脈と矛盾するレコードへ記憶衝突を結び付けます。

object_properties.label: memory consolidation merges records
object_properties.definition: links memory consolidation to the records it distills into a summary, semantic memory, reflective memory, or procedure.

definitions.en: links memory consolidation to the records it distills into a summary, semantic memory, reflective memory, or procedure.
definitions.zh: 记忆巩固合并记录关系把记忆巩固连接到被提炼为摘要、语义记忆、反思记忆或流程的记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶集約がレコードを統合する関係は、記憶集約を要約、意味記憶、反省記憶、手順へ蒸留されるレコードへ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: memory consolidation produces summary
object_properties.definition: records that memory consolidation produced a context summary from observations, episodes, records, feedback, or outcomes.

definitions.en: records that memory consolidation produced a context summary from observations, episodes, records, feedback, or outcomes.
definitions.zh: 记忆巩固产生摘要关系记录记忆巩固从观测、情景、记录、反馈或结果中产生上下文摘要。
definitions.ja: 記憶集約が要約を生成する関係は、観測、エピソード、レコード、フィードバック、結果からコンテキスト要約を生成したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: context assembly module contains
object_properties.definition: declares context assembly and sibling terms as members of the Context Assembly module scope.

definitions.en: declares context assembly and sibling terms as members of the Context Assembly module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

object_properties.label: memory decay lowers record priority
object_properties.definition: records that memory decay lowered a record's freshness, priority, confidence, or retrieval weight over time or after contradictory evidence.

definitions.en: records that memory decay lowered a record's freshness, priority, confidence, or retrieval weight over time or after contradictory evidence.
definitions.zh: 记忆衰减降低记录优先级关系记录记忆衰减随时间或矛盾证据降低记录的新鲜度、优先级、置信度或检索权重。
definitions.ja: 記憶減衰がレコード優先度を下げる関係は、時間または矛盾証拠の後にレコードの新鮮度、優先度、信頼度、検索重みを下げたことを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory delete removes record
object_properties.definition: records that a memory delete operation removed or disabled a memory record under privacy, retention, or user-request policy.

definitions.en: records that a memory delete operation removed or disabled a memory record under privacy, retention, or user-request policy.
definitions.zh: 记忆删除移除记录关系记录记忆删除操作在隐私、保留或用户请求策略下移除或禁用记忆记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶削除がレコードを取り除く関係は、プライバシー、保持、ユーザー要求の方針の下で記憶削除操作が記憶レコードを除去または無効化したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory discard rejects item
object_properties.definition: records that a candidate memory item was rejected before persistence because it was irrelevant, unsafe, duplicate, stale, low confidence, or out of scope.

definitions.en: records that a candidate memory item was rejected before persistence because it was irrelevant, unsafe, duplicate, stale, low confidence, or out of scope.
definitions.zh: 记忆丢弃拒绝记忆项关系记录候选记忆项因无关、不安全、重复、陈旧、低置信度或超出范围而在持久化前被拒绝。
definitions.ja: 記憶破棄が項目を拒否する関係は、候補記憶項目が無関係、安全でない、重複、古い、低信頼、範囲外のため永続化前に拒否されたことを記録します。

object_properties.label: embedding and index module contains
object_properties.definition: declares dense vector and sibling terms as members of the Embedding And Index module scope.

definitions.en: declares dense vector and sibling terms as members of the Embedding And Index module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

object_properties.label: memory eviction evicts record
object_properties.definition: records that memory eviction removed or deprioritized a record from an active store, cache, or candidate pool because of capacity, staleness, or policy.

definitions.en: records that memory eviction removed or deprioritized a record from an active store, cache, or candidate pool because of capacity, staleness, or policy.
definitions.zh: 记忆驱逐驱逐记录关系记录记忆驱逐因容量、陈旧性或策略从活动库、缓存或候选池移除或降低记录优先级。
definitions.ja: 記憶退避がレコードを退避する関係は、容量、古さ、方針により、アクティブストア、キャッシュ、候補プールからレコードを除去または低優先化したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory expiration expires record
object_properties.definition: records that a memory record, summary, index entry, or retention window expired under time, consent, scope, or retention policy.

definitions.en: records that a memory record, summary, index entry, or retention window expired under time, consent, scope, or retention policy.
definitions.zh: 记忆过期使记录过期关系记录记忆记录、摘要、索引条目或保留窗口根据时间、同意、范围或保留策略过期。
definitions.ja: 記憶期限切れがレコードを期限切れにする関係は、時間、同意、スコープ、保持方針により記憶レコード、要約、索引項目、保持ウィンドウが期限切れになったことを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory file materializes record
object_properties.definition: records that a file-backed memory surface materializes a durable memory record such as a convention, note, plan, or preference.

definitions.en: records that a file-backed memory surface materializes a durable memory record such as a convention, note, plan, or preference.
definitions.zh: 记忆文件实现记录关系记录文件承载的记忆表面把约定、笔记、计划或偏好等持久记忆记录具体化。
definitions.ja: 記憶ファイルがレコードを具現化する関係は、ファイルベースの記憶面が規約、メモ、計画、選好などの永続記憶レコードを具現化することを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory ingestion module contains
object_properties.definition: declares database and sibling terms as members of the Memory Ingestion module scope.

definitions.en: declares database and sibling terms as members of the Memory Ingestion module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

object_properties.label: memory lifecycle operations module contains
object_properties.definition: declares memory audit event and sibling terms as members of the Memory Lifecycle Operations module scope.

definitions.en: declares memory audit event and sibling terms as members of the Memory Lifecycle Operations module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系声明记忆审计事件及其同级术语属于记忆生命周期操作模块。
definitions.ja: この関係は、記憶監査イベントとその同位語が記憶ライフサイクル操作モジュールに属することを宣言します。

object_properties.label: memory merge combines records
object_properties.definition: records that a memory merge combined related memory records while preserving provenance, conflict evidence, and supersession lineage.

definitions.en: records that a memory merge combined related memory records while preserving provenance, conflict evidence, and supersession lineage.
definitions.zh: 记忆合并组合记录关系记录记忆合并在保留来源、冲突证据和取代谱系的同时组合相关记忆记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶統合がレコードを組み合わせる関係は、来歴、衝突証拠、置換系譜を保ちながら関連する記憶レコードを組み合わせたことを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory poisoning signal flags memory record
object_properties.definition: links a memory poisoning signal to the specific memory record suspected of carrying adversarial or unsafe persistent influence.

definitions.en: links a memory poisoning signal to the specific memory record suspected of carrying adversarial or unsafe persistent influence.
definitions.zh: 记忆投毒信号标记记忆记录关系把记忆投毒信号连接到疑似携带对抗性或不安全持久影响的具体记忆记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶汚染信号が記憶レコードを標識する関係は、敵対的または安全でない永続的影響を持つ疑いのある特定の記憶レコードへ記憶汚染信号を結び付けます。

object_properties.label: memory record belongs to data zone
object_properties.definition: links a memory record to the data zone governing its trust level, retention, visibility, and allowed reuse.

definitions.en: links a memory record to the data zone governing its trust level, retention, visibility, and allowed reuse.
definitions.zh: 记忆记录属于数据区域关系把记忆记录连接到治理其信任等级、保留、可见性和允许复用的数据区域。
definitions.ja: 記憶レコードがデータゾーンに属する関係は、記憶レコードを、その信頼度、保持、可視性、許可された再利用を統制するデータゾーンへ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: memory record belongs to namespace
object_properties.definition: links a memory record to the namespace that controls lookup, isolation, reuse, and cross-session visibility.

definitions.en: links a memory record to the namespace that controls lookup, isolation, reuse, and cross-session visibility.
definitions.zh: 记忆记录属于命名空间关系把记忆记录连接到控制查找、隔离、复用和跨会话可见性的命名空间。
definitions.ja: 記憶レコードが名前空間に属する関係は、記憶レコードを検索、隔離、再利用、クロスセッション可視性を制御する名前空間へ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: memory record has scope
object_properties.definition: links a memory record to the scope that states where it may be read, written, updated, reused, disclosed, or forgotten.

definitions.en: links a memory record to the scope that states where it may be read, written, updated, reused, disclosed, or forgotten.
definitions.zh: 记忆记录具有范围关系把记忆记录连接到说明其何处可被读取、写入、更新、复用、披露或遗忘的范围。
definitions.ja: 記憶レコードがスコープを持つ関係は、記憶レコードを、どこで読み取り、書き込み、更新、再利用、開示、忘却できるかを示すスコープへ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: memory reflection produces reflective memory
object_properties.definition: records that a reflection event produced higher-level reflective memory from observations, episodes, feedback, or outcomes.

definitions.en: records that a reflection event produced higher-level reflective memory from observations, episodes, feedback, or outcomes.
definitions.zh: 记忆反思产生反思记忆关系记录反思事件从观测、情景、反馈或结果中产生高层反思记忆。
definitions.ja: 記憶反省が反省記憶を生成する関係は、反省イベントが観測、エピソード、フィードバック、結果から高次の反省記憶を生成したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: retrieval and ranking module contains
object_properties.definition: declares candidate chunk and sibling terms as members of the Retrieval And Ranking module scope.

definitions.en: declares candidate chunk and sibling terms as members of the Retrieval And Ranking module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

object_properties.label: memory store governed by retention policy
object_properties.definition: links a memory store to retention policy controlling refresh, compaction, expiration, deletion, disclosure, and audit behavior.

definitions.en: links a memory store to retention policy controlling refresh, compaction, expiration, deletion, disclosure, and audit behavior.
definitions.zh: 记忆库受保留策略治理关系把记忆库连接到控制刷新、压缩、过期、删除、披露和审计行为的保留策略。
definitions.ja: 記憶ストアが保持ポリシーで統制される関係は、記憶ストアを更新、圧縮、期限切れ、削除、開示、監査を制御する保持ポリシーへ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: memory store has namespace
object_properties.definition: links a memory store to the namespace that separates records by user, task, project, tenant, thread, or cross-session reuse context.

definitions.en: links a memory store to the namespace that separates records by user, task, project, tenant, thread, or cross-session reuse context.
definitions.zh: 记忆库具有命名空间关系把记忆库连接到按用户、任务、项目、租户、线程或跨会话复用上下文分隔记录的命名空间。
definitions.ja: 記憶ストアが名前空間を持つ関係は、記憶ストアを、ユーザー、タスク、プロジェクト、テナント、スレッド、クロスセッション再利用文脈ごとにレコードを分ける名前空間へ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: memory store, scope and typology module contains
object_properties.definition: declares cross-session memory and sibling terms as members of the Memory Store, Scope And Typology module scope.

definitions.en: declares cross-session memory and sibling terms as members of the Memory Store, Scope And Typology module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系声明跨会话记忆及其同级术语属于记忆存储、范围与类型模块。
definitions.ja: この関係は、クロスセッション記憶とその同位語が記憶ストア、スコープ、類型モジュールに属することを宣言します。

object_properties.label: memory supersession replaces record
object_properties.definition: records that a newer or higher-authority memory record superseded an older record while preserving lineage and audit evidence.

definitions.en: records that a newer or higher-authority memory record superseded an older record while preserving lineage and audit evidence.
definitions.zh: 记忆取代替换记录关系记录更新或更高权威记忆记录在保留谱系和审计证据的同时取代旧记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶置換がレコードを置き換える関係は、新しい、またはより高権威の記憶レコードが系譜と監査証拠を保ちながら古いレコードを置換したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory update crosses trust boundary
object_properties.definition: records that a memory update crosses or relies on a trust boundary, such as external content entering persistent memory.

definitions.en: records that a memory update crosses or relies on a trust boundary, such as external content entering persistent memory.
definitions.zh: 记忆更新跨越信任边界关系记录记忆更新跨越或依赖信任边界，例如外部内容进入持久记忆。
definitions.ja: 記憶更新が信頼境界を越える関係は、外部内容が永続記憶へ入る場合など、記憶更新が信頼境界を越える、またはそれに依存することを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory update updates record
object_properties.definition: records that a memory update revised a memory record's content, confidence, scope, provenance, retention state, or links.

definitions.en: records that a memory update revised a memory record's content, confidence, scope, provenance, retention state, or links.
definitions.zh: 记忆更新更新记录关系记录记忆更新修订记忆记录的内容、置信度、范围、来源、保留状态或链接。
definitions.ja: 記憶更新がレコードを更新する関係は、記憶更新が記憶レコードの内容、信頼度、スコープ、来歴、保持状態、リンクを修正したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory validation evaluates record
object_properties.definition: links memory validation to the memory record checked for provenance, safety, trust boundary, freshness, conflict, poisoning, or approval.

definitions.en: links memory validation to the memory record checked for provenance, safety, trust boundary, freshness, conflict, poisoning, or approval.
definitions.zh: 记忆验证评估记录关系把记忆验证连接到被检查来源、安全、信任边界、新鲜度、冲突、投毒或批准状态的记忆记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶検証がレコードを評価する関係は、来歴、安全、信頼境界、新鮮度、衝突、汚染、承認について検査された記憶レコードへ記憶検証を結び付けます。

object_properties.label: memory write creates record
object_properties.definition: records that a memory write operation proposed or committed a new memory record from message, trace, tool, preference, summary, or reflection evidence.

definitions.en: records that a memory write operation proposed or committed a new memory record from message, trace, tool, preference, summary, or reflection evidence.
definitions.zh: 记忆写入创建记录关系记录记忆写入操作基于消息、轨迹、工具、偏好、摘要或反思证据提出或提交新记忆记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶書き込みがレコードを作成する関係は、メッセージ、トレース、ツール、選好、要約、反省の証拠から新しい記憶レコードを提案または確定したことを記録します。

object_properties.label: memory write evaluated by policy decision
object_properties.definition: links a memory write to the policy decision that allowed, denied, escalated, sandboxed, or constrained persistence.

definitions.en: links a memory write to the policy decision that allowed, denied, escalated, sandboxed, or constrained persistence.
definitions.zh: 记忆写入由策略决策评估关系把记忆写入连接到允许、拒绝、升级、沙箱化或约束持久化的策略决策。
definitions.ja: 記憶書き込みが方針判断で評価される関係は、記憶書き込みを、永続化を許可、拒否、エスカレーション、サンドボックス化、制約した方針判断へ結び付けます。

object_properties.label: message scanned by pattern scan
object_properties.definition: links a message envelope to the pattern scan that inspected its content blocks, instructions, attachments, or source references for injection and policy risk.

definitions.en: links a message envelope to the pattern scan that inspected its content blocks, instructions, attachments, or source references for injection and policy risk.
definitions.zh: 该关系把消息信封连接到检查其内容块、指令、附件或来源引用中注入与策略风险的模式扫描。
definitions.ja: この関係は、メッセージエンベロープを、その内容ブロック、指示、添付、出典参照の注入リスクとポリシーリスクを検査したパターンスキャンに結びます。

object_properties.label: metric measures run attempt
object_properties.definition: links a Metric to the RunAttempt whose cost, latency, quality, safety, robustness, or outcome it measures.

definitions.en: links a Metric to the RunAttempt whose cost, latency, quality, safety, robustness, or outcome it measures.
definitions.zh: 该关系把指标连接到其衡量的运行尝试。
definitions.ja: この関係は、指標を、それが測定する実行試行へ結びます。

object_properties.label: metric measures tool call
object_properties.definition: links a Metric to the ToolCall whose latency, result quality, failure rate, side effects, or safety behavior it measures.

definitions.en: links a Metric to the ToolCall whose latency, result quality, failure rate, side effects, or safety behavior it measures.
definitions.zh: 该关系把指标连接到其衡量的工具调用。
definitions.ja: この関係は、指標を、それが測定するツール呼び出しへ結びます。

object_properties.label: observed as context input
object_properties.definition: links execution output to the context-ingress event that makes it visible to a model call or agent step.

definitions.en: links execution output to the context-ingress event that makes it visible to a model call or agent step.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: observes
object_properties.definition: links an actor or runtime surface to an event that it records or monitors.

definitions.en: links an actor or runtime surface to an event that it records or monitors.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

object_properties.label: opens runtime session
object_properties.definition: links a session start event to the runtime session it opens with initial actor, environment, goal, and context state.

definitions.en: links a session start event to the runtime session it opens with initial actor, environment, goal, and context state.
definitions.zh: 把会话开始事件连接到它开启的运行会话，并保留初始参与者、环境、目标和上下文状态。
definitions.ja: セッション開始イベントを、それが開く実行セッションへ接続し、初期アクター、環境、目標、文脈状態を保持します。

object_properties.label: optimization loop consumes feedback
object_properties.definition: connects an OptimizationLoop to Feedback it consumes when revising prompts, routes, tool choices, retries, policies, or future attempts.

definitions.en: connects an OptimizationLoop to Feedback it consumes when revising prompts, routes, tool choices, retries, policies, or future attempts.
definitions.zh: 该关系说明优化循环消费反馈以改进后续提示、路由、工具选择或重试。
definitions.ja: この関係は、最適化ループが後続のプロンプト、経路、ツール選択、再試行を改善するためにフィードバックを消費することを示します。

object_properties.label: optimization loop consumes metric
object_properties.definition: connects an OptimizationLoop to a Metric it consumes when improving cost, latency, correctness, robustness, safety, or task success.

definitions.en: connects an OptimizationLoop to a Metric it consumes when improving cost, latency, correctness, robustness, safety, or task success.
definitions.zh: 该关系说明优化循环消费指标以改进成本、延迟、正确性、鲁棒性或安全性。
definitions.ja: この関係は、最適化ループがコスト、遅延、正確性、ロバスト性、安全性を改善するために指標を消費することを示します。

object_properties.label: coordination roles and delegation module contains
object_properties.definition: declares agent as tool invocation and sibling terms as members of the Coordination Roles And Delegation module scope.

definitions.en: declares agent as tool invocation and sibling terms as members of the Coordination Roles And Delegation module scope.
definitions.zh: 声明工具式智能体调用及其同级术语属于协同角色与委派模块范围。
definitions.ja: 道具型エージェント呼び出しと同階層の用語が協調ロールと委任モジュールの範囲に属することを宣言します。

object_properties.label: coordination roles and delegation module emits event
object_properties.definition: connects operations in the Coordination Roles And Delegation module to observable TraceEvent records.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Coordination Roles And Delegation module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 把协同角色与委派模块中的操作连接到可观察轨迹事件记录。
definitions.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュール内の操作を観測可能なトレースイベント記録へ結びます。

object_properties.label: coordination roles and delegation module relates
object_properties.definition: connects agent as tool invocation to answer ownership when both participate in model coordination roles, delegation contracts, handoffs, agents-as-tools, authority scope, context isolation, ownership, worker selection, and delegation budgets.

definitions.en: connects agent as tool invocation to answer ownership when both participate in model coordination roles, delegation contracts, handoffs, agents-as-tools, authority scope, context isolation, ownership, worker selection, and delegation budgets.
definitions.zh: 当工具式智能体调用与答案归属共同参与协同角色、委派契约、交接、工具式调用、授权范围、上下文隔离、归属、工作者选择和委派预算时，将二者连接。
definitions.ja: 道具型エージェント呼び出しと回答帰属が、協調ロール、委任契約、引き継ぎ、道具型呼び出し、権限範囲、文脈隔離、帰属、作業者選択、委任予算に共に関わるとき、両者を結びます。

object_properties.label: composition patterns module contains
object_properties.definition: declares aggregation rule and sibling terms as members of the Composition Patterns module scope.

definitions.en: declares aggregation rule and sibling terms as members of the Composition Patterns module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

object_properties.label: composition patterns module emits event
object_properties.definition: connects operations in the Composition Patterns module to observable TraceEvent records.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Composition Patterns module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词把该模块中的可观察操作连接到运行轨迹事件。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュール内の観測可能な操作を実行トレースイベントへ接続します。

object_properties.label: composition patterns module relates
object_properties.definition: connects aggregation rule to chain stage when both participate in model prompt chains, parallelization, sectioning, voting, and synthesis patterns.

definitions.en: connects aggregation rule to chain stage when both participate in model prompt chains, parallelization, sectioning, voting, and synthesis patterns.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接该模块内共同参与同一语义范围的类。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、同じ意味範囲に参加するモジュール内のクラス同士を接続します。

object_properties.label: control feedback loop module contains
object_properties.definition: declares critique artifact and sibling terms as members of the Control Feedback Loop module scope.

definitions.en: declares critique artifact and sibling terms as members of the Control Feedback Loop module scope.
definitions.zh: 声明批评产物及其同级术语属于控制反馈循环模块范围。
definitions.ja: 批評成果物と同階層の用語が制御フィードバックループモジュールの範囲に属することを宣言します。

object_properties.label: control feedback loop module emits event
object_properties.definition: connects operations in the Control Feedback Loop module to observable TraceEvent records.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Control Feedback Loop module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 把控制反馈循环模块中的操作连接到可观察轨迹事件记录。
definitions.ja: 制御フィードバックループモジュール内の操作を観測可能なトレースイベント記録へ結びます。

object_properties.label: control feedback loop module relates
object_properties.definition: connects critique artifact to evaluator optimizer when both participate in model evaluator-optimizer control loops, review triggers, feedback routing, visible deliberation operations, revisions, and bounded stop or retry lineage.

definitions.en: connects critique artifact to evaluator optimizer when both participate in model evaluator-optimizer control loops, review triggers, feedback routing, visible deliberation operations, revisions, and bounded stop or retry lineage.
definitions.zh: 当批评产物与评估优化者共同参与评估优化控制循环、审查触发、反馈路由、可见审议、修订和停止重试脉络时，将二者连接。
definitions.ja: 批評成果物と評価最適化役が、評価最適化制御ループ、レビュー発火、フィードバック経路、可視の検討操作、修正、停止再試行の系譜に共に関わるとき、両者を結びます。

object_properties.label: routing and control module contains
object_properties.definition: declares branch condition and sibling terms as members of the Routing And Control module scope.

definitions.en: declares branch condition and sibling terms as members of the Routing And Control module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

object_properties.label: routing and control module emits event
object_properties.definition: connects operations in the Routing And Control module to observable TraceEvent records.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Routing And Control module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词把该模块中的可观察操作连接到运行轨迹事件。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュール内の観測可能な操作を実行トレースイベントへ接続します。

object_properties.label: routing and control module relates
object_properties.definition: connects branch condition to downstream operation when both participate in model gates, routes, control policies, branching, and downstream operation selection.

definitions.en: connects branch condition to downstream operation when both participate in model gates, routes, control policies, branching, and downstream operation selection.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接该模块内共同参与同一语义范围的类。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、同じ意味範囲に参加するモジュール内のクラス同士を接続します。

definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。

object_properties.definition: connects operations in the Task Planning module to observable TraceEvent records.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Task Planning module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词把该模块中的可观察操作连接到运行轨迹事件。

object_properties.definition: connects goal to objective when both participate in model tasks, decomposition, work items, plans, and task dependencies.

definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接该模块内共同参与同一语义范围的类。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、同じ意味範囲に参加するモジュール内のクラス同士を接続します。

object_properties.definition: links an output segment to the sensitive span requiring redaction, masking, suppression, delayed release, or restricted routing.

definitions.en: links an output segment to the sensitive span requiring redaction, masking, suppression, delayed release, or restricted routing.
definitions.zh: 该关系把输出片段连接到需要脱敏、掩码、抑制、延迟释放或限制路由的敏感片段。
definitions.ja: この関係は、出力セグメントを、秘匿、マスク、抑制、遅延解放、経路制限が必要な機微範囲に結びます。

object_properties.label: overrides instruction
object_properties.definition: links an authorized instruction override to the lower-priority or narrower instruction it replaces or limits.

definitions.en: links an authorized instruction override to the lower-priority or narrower instruction it replaces or limits.

object_properties.definition: DAG relation that states that a component belongs to a larger plane, system, session, trace, or process

definitions.en: DAG relation that states that a component belongs to a larger plane, system, session, trace, or process
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为任意实体，值域为任意实体；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域が任意エンティティ、値域が任意エンティティです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

object_properties.label: part of conversation
object_properties.definition: links a message or turn to the conversation or thread that supplies ordering and continuity.

definitions.en: links a message or turn to the conversation or thread that supplies ordering and continuity.
